reason: Project constraints: SwiftUI + AppKit shell + Rust core, Chinese-first UI, LocalPort reference boundary.
Bridge commands must be coarse-grained and structured.
Existing registry persistence contract and parse_ssh_command boundary shape.
Parser and bridge errors must stay structured and user-visible.
Rust core owns SSH parsing and domain validation.
Imported SSH command strings must become structured rule mappings, not runtime source strings.
Imported rules must persist through existing configuration storage without credentials.
Registry import sheet must stay native and Chinese-first.
Resource registry uses focused sheet flows, not page-level editors.
Swift must not own SSH command parsing or domain state machines.
Product requirements for SSH command import and multi -L handling.
Provider target interpretation and SSH/Tailscale boundaries.
